name: Microwaved Caramels
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8x8x2 inches square pan with foil, leaving ends of foil overhanging the edges of the pan.
2. Lightly butter the foil. Set aside.
3. Combine cream and milk in a microwave-safe 8-cup glass measure. Cover tightly with plastic wrap.
4. Microwave at full power for 3 minutes.
5. Carefully prick the plastic to release steam. Carefully uncover the measure.
6. Stir sugar and syrup into the glass measure, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
7. Microwave, uncovered, at full power for 21 minutes, stirring carefully three times during cooking.
8. Remove from oven. Stir in butter until blended.
9. Pour caramel into the prepared pan, scraping out the glass measure thoroughly.
10. Refrigerate until the caramel is set firm. Remove from the pan by pulling up with the ends of the foil. Invert the caramel and peel off the foil.
11. Cut into 64 squares. Wrap each square individually in colored plastic. Store in the refrigerator.
12. If using the 8-cup measure, watch closely after it starts to boil. You may need to lower the temperature to prevent boiling over.
